texts.title: 蒲公英的約定
texts.description: Jay Chou - Pu gong ying de yue ding

lines.pinyin: xiao xue li ba pang de pu gong ying
lines.translation: The dandelions by the fence at primary school

lines.hanzi: 是記憶裡有味道的風景
lines.pinyin: shi ji yi li you wei dao de feng jing
lines.translation: Are a landscape in memory filled with a certain scent

lines.hanzi: 午睡操場傳來蟬的聲音
lines.pinyin: wu shui cao chang chuan lai chan de sheng yin
lines.translation: From the playground at naptime comes the sound of cicadas

lines.hanzi: 多少年後也還是很好聽
lines.pinyin: duo shao nian hou ye hai shi hen hao ting
lines.translation: Even many years later, it still sounds beautiful

lines.hanzi: 將願望折紙飛機寄成信
lines.pinyin: jiang yuan wang zhe zhi fei ji ji cheng xin
lines.translation: Folding wishes into paper planes and sending them like letters

lines.hanzi: 因為我們等不到那流星
lines.pinyin: yin wei wo men deng bu dao na liu xing
lines.translation: Because we couldn’t wait for that shooting star

lines.hanzi: 認真投決定命運的硬幣
lines.pinyin: ren zhen tou jue ding ming yun de ying bi
lines.translation: Seriously tossing a coin to decide our fate

lines.hanzi: 卻不知道到底能去哪裡
lines.pinyin: que bu zhi dao dao di neng qu na li
lines.translation: Yet not knowing where it would actually take us

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣清晰 打過勾的我相信
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang qing xi da guo gou de wo xiang xin
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so clear—I believed in it once we checked it off

lines.hanzi: 說好要一起旅行 是妳如今 唯一堅持的任性
lines.pinyin: shuo hao yao yi qi lv xing shi ni ru jin wei yi jian chi de ren xing
lines.translation: We said we’d travel together—that’s now your only stubborn insistence

lines.hanzi: 在走廊上罰站打手心 我們卻注意窗邊的蜻蜓
lines.pinyin: zai zou lang shang fa zhan da shou xin wo men que zhu yi chuang bian de qing ting
lines.translation: Standing punished in the hallway, we paid more attention to the dragonflies by the window

lines.hanzi: 我去到哪裡妳都跟很緊 很多的夢在等待著進行
lines.pinyin: wo qu dao na li ni dou gen hen jin hen duo de meng zai deng dai zhe jin xing
lines.translation: Wherever I went, you followed closely—so many dreams were waiting to unfold

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣清晰 打過勾的我相信
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang qing xi da guo gou de wo xiang xin
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so clear—I believed in it once we checked it off

lines.hanzi: 說好要一起旅行 是妳如今 唯一堅持的任性
lines.pinyin: shuo hao yao yi qi lv xing shi ni ru jin wei yi jian chi de ren xing
lines.translation: We said we’d travel together—that’s now your only stubborn insistence

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣真心 與妳聊不完的曾經
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang zhen xin yu ni liao bu wan de ceng jing
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so sincere—with endless memories to talk about with you

lines.hanzi: 而我已經分不清 妳是友情 還是錯過的愛情
lines.pinyin: er wo yi jing fen bu qing ni shi you qing hai shi cuo guo de ai qing
lines.translation: And now I can’t tell whether you are friendship, or a love that slipped away
